scope: conversational CLI routing decision and workflow dispatch authority unification review
certification_summary: Dispatch authority should move to CONVERSATIONAL_WORKFLOW_SELECTION_ARTIFACT_V1, hash-bound to CONVERSATIONAL_ROUTING_DECISION_ARTIFACT_V1. CONVERSATIONAL_ROUTING_VISIBILITY_ARTIFACT_V1 should remain visibility-only and be generated from the authoritative selection.

migration_certification.recommended_architecture: Stateful Resume Gate -> route_conversational_cli_intent -> CONVERSATIONAL_WORKFLOW_SELECTION_ARTIFACT_V1 -> dispatch by workflow_id -> visibility projection -> workflow runtime
minimum_required_tests: OCS prompt visibility and dispatch equality
operator decision-support visibility and dispatch equality
ambiguous OCS/operator prompt single authoritative workflow
unmapped prompt fail-closed or explicit fallback behavior certified
migration_certification.certification_condition: CERTIFIED only after all existing CLI tests and new dispatch-authority regression tests pass.

final_answer: AiGOL conversational CLI can safely move to Routing Decision = Dispatch Authority without breaking existing certified workflows only through a staged migration using CONVERSATIONAL_WORKFLOW_SELECTION_ARTIFACT_V1, with stateful pre-routing gates preserved and missing workflows explicitly registered or retained as documented exceptions.
